title: Mofu's Better End/ Mofu's Broken Constellation
description: Mofu’s Broken Constellation expands the End and beyond with new biomes, structures, and a mysterious second dimension. Uncover a hidden storyline, face unique bosses, and shape the fate of a forgotten realm.
body:
As you open the End Archive, a strange energy pulses from its pages. The words shift and reshape themselves as if written by the void itself. A path lies before you — fragmented, dangerous, and filled with forgotten power.

Your journey begins in the Outer End Islands. This is where all of the mod's content unfolds. The familiar End fades behind you as you step into lands twisted by time and gravity — each biome more mysterious than the last. 

Your main objective is to craft the Book of Void, a powerful artifact that hides horrible secrets. To do this, you must explore all of the biomes of the End and uncover the ancient structures hidden within them. Since each holds a key component:

From the End Tower, retrieve the Labyrinth Crystal
From the lair of the Endermite Queen, claim her Soul
Within the Eye Guardian's Observatory, obtain the Void Glass Globe
While the remaining components can be found in the Clock Tower, where time itself seems fractured.

Only by gathering all of these can the Book be crafted, unlocking the deeper secrets of the End.

The Clock Tower stands as the final structure of the End. Inside, you must destroy the four temporal locks and awaken the mechanical angel, final boss Of the end. Once defeated, it will stop guarding the portal, releasing it from it’s custody— cracked and flickering — to a realm beyond space and reason: the Broken Constellation. 

Note: Content beyond this point may change in version 1.0, as the Broken Dimension is still under development. 

Passing through the portal, you arrive in a fractured dimension. Two unique biomes await, each containing a powerful guardian.

In the first biome, face the Litch, a spectral figure forgotten by it’s own god
In the second, navigate a massive puzzle structure to obtain the Luminion Core, a vital source of raw power

Within the Luminion Labyrinth, ancient blueprints are hidden—remnants of a forgotten civilization, maybe now extinct. Using these and the Mech Creation Station, you’ll be able to craft: 

the Titanium Drill, capable of piercing even the hardest voidstone 
and two submarines, designed for deep exploration and survival

Many other artifacts lie in wait, as the mod keeps being developed adding new biomes, bosses and items!
